page: Microsoft Azure DC8es_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEV5 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. The instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type does not include any local storage, meaning operating systems and application data must rely on external storage solutions, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. Additionally, the DC8es_v5 does not feature any integrated GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel computing tasks. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and memory density position this instance as a stable resource pool for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without the overhead of physical hardware management. Given its 8 vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM, the instance is suited for general-purpose workloads, medium-sized databases, enterprise application hosting, and development environments that require dedicated CPU resources and Premium Storage compatibility.
description: Microsoft Azure DC8es_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine within the DCEV5 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage, requiring external storage solutions, but it is Premium Storage capable. It also lacks GPU acceleration and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for memory-optimized and general-purpose workloads, the DC8es_v5 offers a qualitative balance of dedicated compute resources and memory capacity. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable execution times, making it a reliable choice for production environments. This configuration is suitable for database hosting, enterprise applications, and mid-range web serving where consistent CPU performance and external storage flexibility are required.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core virtual machine with thirty-two gigabytes of memory and premium storage compatibility for consistent enterprise workloads.
